keywords: seat before payment TTL hold reserve atomic ordering race condition double booking last ticket
ironRules: Seat must be atomically reserved (TTL hold) BEFORE payment is initiated — no exceptions
TTL hold must be placed via F274 ICapacityLockService — no direct DB writes
If payment fails, TTL hold expires automatically — no manual release needed
Any code path initiating payment before seat hold is a BUILD_FAILURE per CF-09-1
